You are working on heat ₣AR (rbw-ark-vessel-vocabulary), pace ₢ARAAT (implement-rbf-abjure).

## Spec
Implement rbf_abjure() in rbf_Foundry.sh following the RBSAA-ark_abjure.adoc spec. Takes vessel and consecration arguments, deletes both -image and -about artifacts as a coherent ark unit. Follow the existing rbf_delete() pattern for HTTP/auth mechanics but operate on paired tags. Add coordinator routing (rbw-fA or similar) in rbk_Coordinator.sh and a tabtarget launcher. Handle orphaned artifacts (one exists, other missing) with warnings per spec. Include --force flag to skip confirmation prompt.

## Direction
Agent: sonnet | Cardinality: 1 sequential | Files: Tools/rbw/rbf_Foundry.sh, Tools/rbw/rbk_Coordinator.sh, tt/rbw-fA.AbjureArk.sh (3 files)

Steps:
1. Read rbf_delete in rbf_Foundry.sh and RBSAA-ark_abjure.adoc spec as patterns
2. Add rbf_abjure function after rbf_delete -- takes vessel and consecration args, constructs both tags using RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE and RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT, HEAD-checks each tag for existence, warns on orphaned artifacts, prompts for confirmation unless --force, deletes each existing artifact via DELETE, reports results
3. Add rbw-fA routing in rbk_Coordinator.sh case statement in the Foundry commands section pointing to rbf_cli.sh rbf_abjure
4. Create tt/rbw-fA.AbjureArk.sh tabtarget following exact pattern of tt/rbw-fD.DeleteImage.sh
5. Use ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX for temp files and ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE for endpoints -- add abjure-specific temp file vars in zrbf_kindle if needed

Verify: bash -n Tools/rbw/rbf_Foundry.sh and bash -n Tools/rbw/rbk_Coordinator.sh

## Important context
- Working directory is /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster
- Never `cd` — use full paths or relative paths from project root
- Constants file: Tools/rbw/rbgc_Constants.sh (has RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE, RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT, RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX)
- This is a documentation-heavy heat but THIS pace is actual bash implementation

## Wrap Discipline

DO NOT run /jjc-pace-wrap or mark the pace complete. When work is done:
1. Run bash -n verification on modified shell files
2. Report completion status and verification results
3. STOP — the calling agent will confirm wrap with the user

## Commit Discipline
Do NOT make any git commits. Just make the code changes and verify syntax. The calling agent handles commits.

1→NOTE: This operation formally renounces an
     2→{rbtga_ark}
     3→from
     4→{rbtgi_repository}
     5→using the Docker Registry HTTP API V2 implemented by
     6→{gar_service}.
     7→
     8→An
     9→{rbtga_ark}
    10→is the coherent unit of a Recipe Bottle build: a paired set of artifacts sharing a common
    11→{rbtga_consecration}
    12→but distinguished by suffix.
    13→The
    14→{rbtga_ark_image}
    15→(`-image`) contains the container image itself.
    16→The
    17→{rbtga_ark_about}
    18→(`-about`) contains build provenance, SBOM, and metadata.
    19→Abjuring an ark removes both artifacts as a single logical operation.
    20→
    21→The
    22→{rbtr_director}
    23→abjures an ark:
    24→
    25→// ⟦axs_inputs⟧
    26→. *Validate Input Parameters*:
    27→.. {rbbc_require}
    28→`«INPUT_VESSEL»` provided as first argument
    29→.. {rbbc_require}
    30→`«INPUT_CONSECRATION»` provided as second argument
    31→.. {rbbc_fatal}
    32→if vessel missing: "Vessel parameter required"
    33→.. {rbbc_fatal}
    34→if consecration missing: "Consecration parameter required"
    35→
    36→. *Validate Consecration Format*:
    37→.. {rbbc_require}
    38→`«INPUT_CONSECRATION»` matches pattern `YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ` or similar timestamp format
    39→.. {rbbc_fatal}
    40→if malformed: "Consecration format invalid"
    41→
    42→// ⟦axs_behavior⟧
    43→. *Authenticate as
    44→{rbtr_director}*:
    45→.. Execute
    46→{rbtoe_director_authenticate}
    47→.. {rbbc_store}
    48→`«DIRECTOR_TOKEN»` for subsequent API calls
    49→
    50→. *Construct Registry Endpoint*:
    51→.. {rbbc_store}
    52→`«REGISTRY_HOST»` as `{rbrr_gcp_region}-docker.pkg.dev`
    53→.. {rbbc_store}
    54→`«REGISTRY_PATH»` as `{rbrr_depot_project_id}/{rbrr_gar_repository}`
    55→.. {rbbc_store}
    56→`«REGISTRY_BASE»` as `https://«REGISTRY_HOST»/v2/«REGISTRY_PATH»`
    57→
    58→. *Construct Ark Tags*:
    59→.. {rbbc_store}
    60→`«IMAGE_TAG»` as `«INPUT_VESSEL»:«INPUT_CONSECRATION»-image`
    61→.. {rbbc_store}
    62→`«ABOUT_TAG»` as `«INPUT_VESSEL»:«INPUT_CONSECRATION»-about`
    63→
    64→. *Verify Ark Existence*:
    65→.. {rbbc_call}
    66→link:https://github.com/opencontainers/distribution-spec/blob/main/spec.md#pulling-manifests[Docker Registry API: HEAD manifests] for `«IMAGE_TAG»`:
    67→... method: `HEAD`
    68→... endpoint: `«REGISTRY_BASE»/«INPUT_VESSEL»/manifests/«INPUT_CONSECRATION»-image`
    69→... header: `Authorization: Bearer «DIRECTOR_TOKEN»`
    70→... header: `Accept: application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json, application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.list.v2+json, application/vnd.oci.image.index.v1+json, application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json`
    71→.. {rbbc_store}
    72→`«IMAGE_EXISTS»` as true if HTTP 200, false if HTTP 404
    73→.. {rbbc_call}
    74→same HEAD request for `«ABOUT_TAG»`:
    75→... endpoint: `«REGISTRY_BASE»/«INPUT_VESSEL»/manifests/«INPUT_CONSECRATION»-about`
    76→.. {rbbc_store}
    77→`«ABOUT_EXISTS»` as true if HTTP 200, false if HTTP 404
    78→
    79→. *Evaluate Ark State*:
    80→.. If both `«IMAGE_EXISTS»` and `«ABOUT_EXISTS»` are false:
    81→... {rbbc_fatal}
    82→"Ark not found: neither -image nor -about exists"
    83→.. If exactly one exists:
    84→... {rbbc_warn}
    85→"Orphaned artifact detected"
    86→... {rbbc_show}
    87→which artifact exists and which is missing
    88→.. {rbbc_store}
    89→`«ARTIFACTS_TO_DELETE»` as list of existing artifacts
    90→
    91→. *Confirm Abjuration*:
    92→.. Unless `--force` flag provided:
    93→... {rbbc_show}
    94→"Will abjure ark «INPUT_VESSEL»/«INPUT_CONSECRATION»:"
    95→... For each artifact in `«ARTIFACTS_TO_DELETE»`:
    96→.... {rbbc_show}
    97→`  - «TAG»`
    98→... {rbbc_prompt}
    99→"Proceed with abjuration? [y/N]"
   100→... {rbbc_require}
   101→user confirmation
   102→... {rbbc_fatal}
   103→if declined: "Abjuration cancelled"
   104→
   105→. *Delete Image Artifact* (if exists):
   106→.. If `«IMAGE_EXISTS»`:
   107→... {rbbc_call}
   108→link:https://github.com/opencontainers/distribution-spec/blob/main/spec.md#deleting-tags[Docker Registry API: DELETE manifests] with:
   109→.... method: `DELETE`
   110→.... endpoint: `«REGISTRY_BASE»/«INPUT_VESSEL»/manifests/«INPUT_CONSECRATION»-image`
   111→.... header: `Authorization: Bearer «DIRECTOR_TOKEN»`
   112→... {rbbc_require}
   113→HTTP 202 (Accepted) or 204 (No Content) response
   114→... {rbbc_fatal}
   115→if delete fails: "Failed to delete -image artifact (HTTP «STATUS_CODE»)"
   116→
   117→. *Delete About Artifact* (if exists):
   118→.. If `«ABOUT_EXISTS»`:
   119→... {rbbc_call}
   120→Docker Registry API: DELETE manifests with:
   121→.... method: `DELETE`
   122→.... endpoint: `«REGISTRY_BASE»/«INPUT_VESSEL»/manifests/«INPUT_CONSECRATION»-about`
   123→.... header: `Authorization: Bearer «DIRECTOR_TOKEN»`
   124→... {rbbc_require}
   125→HTTP 202 (Accepted) or 204 (No Content) response
   126→... {rbbc_fatal}
   127→if delete fails: "Failed to delete -about artifact (HTTP «STATUS_CODE»)"
   128→
   129→// ⟦axs_outputs⟧
   130→. *Display Results*:
   131→.. {rbbc_show}
   132→"Ark abjured: «INPUT_VESSEL»/«INPUT_CONSECRATION»"
   133→.. For each deleted artifact:
   134→... {rbbc_show}
   135→`  - «TAG» deleted`
   136→
   137→// ⟦axs_completion⟧
   138→Procedure completes successfully when all existing ark artifacts have been deleted from the registry and the abjuration confirmation is displayed.
   139→The ark is now formally renounced and no longer part of the repository corpus.
   140→

   134→zrbf_sentinel() {

   138→zrbf_stitch_build_json() {
   139→  zrbf_sentinel
   140→
   141→  buc_log_args 'Stitching build JSON from step scripts'
   142→
   143→  # Step definitions: script:builder:entrypoint:id
   144→  # Entrypoint 'bash' uses args ["-lc", script], 'sh' uses ["-c", script]
   145→  # Note: Step 05 (buildx-create) was merged into step 06 because Cloud Build
   146→  # steps run in isolated containers - builder state doesn't persist across steps
   147→  #
   148→  # OCI Layout Bridge pattern (steps 06-08):
   149→  # - Step 06: buildx exports to /workspace/oci-layout (no auth needed)
   150→  # - Step 07: Skopeo pushes from oci-layout to GAR (with metadata auth)
   151→  # - Step 08: Syft analyzes from oci-layout (faster, more accurate)
   152→  # - Step 10: Assembles metadata JSON from .image_uri
   153→  # - Step 09: Builds and pushes metadata container (depends on step 10)
   154→  # Step definitions: script:builder:entrypoint:id
   155→  # Note: syft and alpine images hardcoded here; parameterize later if needed
   156→  local z_step_defs=(
   157→    "rbgjb01-derive-tag-base.sh:gcr.io/cloud-builders/gcloud:bash:derive-tag-base"
   158→    "rbgjb02-get-docker-token.sh:gcr.io/cloud-builders/gcloud:bash:get-docker-token"
   159→    "rbgjb03-docker-login-gar.sh:gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker:bash:docker-login-gar"
   160→    "rbgjb04-qemu-binfmt.sh:gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker:bash:qemu-binfmt"
   161→    "rbgjb06-build-and-export.sh:gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker:bash:build-and-export"
   162→    "rbgjb07-push-with-skopeo.sh:quay.io/skopeo/stable:bash:push-with-skopeo"
   163→    "rbgjb08-sbom-and-summary.sh:gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker:bash:sbom-and-summary"
   164→    "rbgjb10-assemble-metadata.sh:alpine:sh:assemble-metadata"
   165→    "rbgjb09-build-and-push-metadata.sh:gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker:bash:build-and-push-metadata"
   166→  )
   167→
   168→  # Build JSON array of steps
   169→  local z_steps_json="[]"
   170→  local z_def z_script z_builder z_entrypoint z_id z_script_path z_body z_escaped z_arg_flag
   171→
   172→  for z_def in "${z_step_defs[@]}"; do
   173→    IFS=':' read -r z_script z_builder z_entrypoint z_id <<< "${z_def}"
   174→    z_script_path="${ZRBF_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR}/${z_script}"
   175→
   176→    test -f "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Step script not found: ${z_script_path}"
   177→
   178→    # Read script body, skip shebang only (comments pass through harmlessly)
   179→    z_body=$(tail -n +2 "${z_script_path}")
   180→
   181→    # Escape $ to $$ for Cloud Build, but preserve ${_RBGY_*} substitutions
   182→    # First escape all $, then restore _RBGY_ substitution vars back to single $
   183→    z_escaped=$(printf '%s' "${z_body}" | sed 's/\$/\$\$/g; s/\$\${_RBGY_/${_RBGY_/g')
   184→
   185→    # Determine arg flag based on entrypoint
   186→    case "${z_entrypoint}" in
   187→      bash) z_arg_flag="-lc" ;;
   188→      sh)   z_arg_flag="-c" ;;
   189→      *)    buc_die "Unknown entrypoint: ${z_entrypoint}" ;;
   190→    esac
   191→
   192→    # Append step to JSON array
   193→    z_steps_json=$(printf '%s' "${z_steps_json}" | jq \
   194→      --arg name "${z_builder}" \
   195→      --arg id "${z_id}" \
   196→      --arg ep "${z_entrypoint}" \
   197→      --arg flag "${z_arg_flag}" \
   198→      --arg script "${z_escaped}" \
   199→      '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, entrypoint: $ep, args: [$flag, $script]}]')
   200→  done
   201→
   202→  # Write final JSON structure
   203→  printf '%s' "${z_steps_json}" | jq '{steps: .}' > "${ZRBF_STITCHED_BUILD_FILE}" \
   204→    || buc_die "Failed to write stitched build JSON"
   205→
   206→  buc_log_args "Stitched ${#z_step_defs[@]} steps to ${ZRBF_STITCHED_BUILD_FILE}"
   207→}

   209→zrbf_load_vessel() {
   210→  zrbf_sentinel
   211→
   212→  local z_vessel_dir="$1"
   213→
   214→  buc_log_args 'Validate vessel directory exists'
   215→  test -d "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "Vessel directory not found: ${z_vessel_dir}"

   220→

   223→

   225→  local z_validator_dir="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
   226→  source "${z_validator_dir}/rbrv_regime.sh" || buc_die "Failed to validate vessel configuration"
   227→
   228→  buc_log_args 'Validate vessel directory matches sigil'
   229→  local z_vessel_dir_clean="${z_vessel_dir%/}"  # Strip any trailing slash
   230→  local z_dir_name="${z_vessel_dir_clean##*/}"  # Extract directory name
   231→  buc_log_args "  z_vessel_dir = ${z_vessel_dir}"

   233→  test "${z_dir_name}" = "${RBRV_SIGIL}" || buc_die "Vessel sigil '${RBRV_SIGIL}' does not match directory name '${z_dir_name}'"

   239→  local z_expected_realpath=""

   241→  test "${z_vessel_realpath}" = "${z_expected_realpath}" || buc_die "Vessel directory '${z_vessel_dir}' does not match expected location '${z_expected_vessel_dir}'"

   249→zrbf_verify_git_clean() {
   250→  zrbf_sentinel
   251→
   252→  buc_step "Verifying git repository state"
   253→
   254→  buc_log_args 'Check for uncommitted changes'
   255→  git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- || buc_die "Uncommitted changes detected - commit or stash first"
   256→
   257→  buc_log_args 'Check for untracked files'
   258→  git ls-files --others --exclude-standard > "${ZRBF_GIT_UNTRACKED_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to check untracked files"
   259→  local z_untracked=""
   260→  z_untracked=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_UNTRACKED_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read untracked list"
   261→  test -z "${z_untracked}" || buc_die "Untracked files present - commit or clean first"
   262→
   263→  buc_log_args 'Check if all commits are pushed'
   264→  git fetch --quiet || buc_die "git fetch failed"
   265→  git rev-list @{u}..HEAD --count > "${ZRBF_GIT_UNTRACKED_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || echo "0" > "${ZRBF_GIT_UNTRACKED_FILE}"
   266→  local z_unpushed=""
   267→  z_unpushed=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_UNTRACKED_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read ahead count"
   268→  test "${z_unpushed}" -eq 0 || buc_die "Local commits not pushed (${z_unpushed} commits ahead)"
   269→
   270→  buc_log_args 'Get git metadata'
   271→  git rev-parse HEAD              > "${ZRBF_GIT_COMMIT_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to get commit SHA"
   272→  git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD > "${ZRBF_GIT_BRANCH_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to get branch name"
   273→
   274→  buc_log_args 'Get first available remote'
   275→  git remote | head -1 > "${ZRBF_GIT_REMOTE_FILE}" || buc_die "No git remotes configured"
   276→  local z_remote=""
   277→  z_remote=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_REMOTE_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read remote name"
   278→  test -n "${z_remote}" || buc_die "No git remotes found"
   279→
   280→  buc_log_args 'Get repo URL from remote: ${z_remote}'
   281→  git config --get "remote.${z_remote}.url" > "${ZRBF_GIT_REPO_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to get repo URL"
   282→
   283→  local z_commit=""
   284→  local z_branch=""
   285→  local z_repo_url=""
   286→  z_commit=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_COMMIT_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read commit"
   287→  z_branch=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_BRANCH_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read branch"
   288→  z_repo_url=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_REPO_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read repo url"
   289→
   290→  test -n "${z_commit}"   || buc_die "Git commit is empty"
   291→  test -n "${z_branch}"   || buc_die "Git branch is empty"
   292→  test -n "${z_repo_url}" || buc_die "Git repo URL is empty"
   293→
   294→  buc_log_args 'Extract owner/repo from URL (handles both HTTPS and SSH)'
   295→  # Example HTTPS: https://github.com/owner/repo.git
   296→  # Example SSH  : git@github.com:owner/repo.git
   297→  local z_repo="${z_repo_url#*github.com[:/]}"
   298→  z_repo="${z_repo%.git}"
   299→
   300→  buc_log_args 'Write git info JSON'
   301→  jq -n                        \
   302→    --arg commit "${z_commit}" \
   303→    --arg branch "${z_branch}" \
   304→    --arg repo   "${z_repo}"   \
   305→    '{"commit": $commit, "branch": $branch, "repo": $repo}' \
   306→    > "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to write git info"
   307→
   308→  buc_info "Git state clean - commit: ${z_commit:0:8} on ${z_branch}"
   309→}

   311→zrbf_package_context() {
   312→  zrbf_sentinel
   313→
   314→  local z_dockerfile="$1"
   315→  local z_context_dir="$2"
   316→
   317→  buc_step 'Packaging build context (source only, no build config)'
   318→
   319→  buc_log_args 'Create temp directory for context'
   320→  rm -rf "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}" || buc_warn "Failed to clean existing staging directory"
   321→  mkdir -p "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}" || buc_die "Failed to create staging directory"
   322→
   323→  buc_log_args 'Copy context to staging'
   324→  cp -r "${z_context_dir}/." "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}/" || buc_die "Failed to copy context"
   325→
   326→  buc_log_args 'Copy Dockerfile to context root if not already there'
   327→  local z_dockerfile_name="${z_dockerfile##*/}"
   328→  cp "${z_dockerfile}" "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}/${z_dockerfile_name}" || buc_die "Failed to copy Dockerfile"
   329→
   330→  buc_log_args "Create tarball"
   331→  tar -czf "${ZRBF_BUILD_CONTEXT_TAR}" -C "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}" . || buc_die "Failed to create context archive"
   332→
   333→  buc_log_args "Clean up staging"
   334→  rm -rf "${ZRBF_STAGING_DIR}" || buc_warn "Failed to cleanup staging directory"
   335→
   336→  buc_log_args 'Compute archive size (bytes) using temp file'
   337→  wc -c < "${ZRBF_BUILD_CONTEXT_TAR}" > "${ZRBF_CONTEXT_SIZE_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to compute context size"
   338→  local z_size_bytes=""
   339→  z_size_bytes=$(<"${ZRBF_CONTEXT_SIZE_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read context size"
   340→  test -n "${z_size_bytes}" || buc_die "Context size is empty"
   341→
   342→  # Size policy: warn >1MB; die >10MB
   343→  if test "${z_size_bytes}" -gt 10485760; then
   344→    buc_die  "Context tarball too large: ${z_size_bytes} bytes (>10MB limit)"
   345→  elif test "${z_size_bytes}" -gt 1048576; then
   346→    buc_warn "Context tarball large: ${z_size_bytes} bytes (>1MB warning)"
   347→  fi
   348→
   349→  buc_info "Build context packaged: ${z_size_bytes} bytes"
   350→}

   411→zrbf_compose_build_request_json() {
   412→  zrbf_sentinel
   413→
   414→  # Stitch step scripts into build JSON
   415→  zrbf_stitch_build_json
   416→
   417→  jq empty "${ZRBF_BUILD_CONFIG_FILE}"    || buc_die "Build config is not valid JSON"
   418→  jq empty "${ZRBF_STITCHED_BUILD_FILE}"  || buc_die "Stitched build file is not valid JSON"
   419→
   420→  local z_obj_name=""
   421→  z_obj_name=$(<"${ZRBF_TARBALL_NAME_FILE}") || buc_die "Missing tarball name"
   422→
   423→  # Merge steps from stitched build JSON with runtime substitutions and config
   424→  # Service account must be in projects/{project}/serviceAccounts/{email} format
   425→  local z_sa_resource="projects/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"
   426→  jq -n \
   427→    --slurpfile sub   "${ZRBF_BUILD_CONFIG_FILE}"    \
   428→    --slurpfile build "${ZRBF_STITCHED_BUILD_FILE}"  \
   429→    --arg bucket "${RBGD_GCS_BUCKET}"                \
   430→    --arg object "${z_obj_name}"                     \
   431→    --arg sa     "${z_sa_resource}"                  \
   432→    --arg mtype  "${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}"          \
   433→    --arg to     "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}"               \
   434→    '{
   435→      source: { storageSource: { bucket: $bucket, object: $object } },
   436→      steps: $build[0].steps,
   437→      substitutions: ($sub[0].substitutions),
   438→      options: { logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY", machineType: $mtype },
   439→      serviceAccount: $sa,
   440→      timeout: $to
   441→    }' > "${ZRBF_BUILD_REQUEST_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to compose build request json"
   442→}

   444→zrbf_submit_build_json() {
   445→  zrbf_sentinel
   446→  buc_step 'Submitting build (JSON) to Google Cloud Build'
   447→
   448→  local z_token=""
   449→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get GCB OAuth token"
   450→
   451→  curl -sS -X POST                              \
   452→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"       \
   453→    -H "Content-Type: application/json"         \
   454→    -H "Accept: application/json"               \
   455→    --data-binary @"${ZRBF_BUILD_REQUEST_FILE}" \
   456→    -o "${ZRBF_BUILD_RESPONSE_FILE}"            \
   457→    -w "%{http_code}"                           \
   458→    "${ZRBF_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}" > "${ZRBF_BUILD_HTTP_CODE}" || buc_die "Build create request failed"
   459→
   460→  local z_http=""
   461→  z_http=$(<"${ZRBF_BUILD_HTTP_CODE}") || buc_die "No HTTP status from Cloud Build create"
   462→  test "${z_http}" = "200" -o "${z_http}" = "201" || buc_die "Cloud Build create failed (HTTP ${z_http})"
   463→  test -s "${ZRBF_BUILD_RESPONSE_FILE}" || buc_die "Empty Cloud Build response"
   464→
   465→  # Accept Operation or Build; prefer metadata.build.id else .id
   466→  local z_build_id=""
   467→  z_build_id=$(jq -r '(.metadata.build.id // .id // empty)' "${ZRBF_BUILD_RESPONSE_FILE}") || z_build_id=""
   468→  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build id not found in response"
   469→  echo "${z_build_id}" > "${ZRBF_BUILD_ID_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to persist build id"
   470→
   471→  local z_console_url="${ZRBF_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE};region=${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/${z_build_id}?project=${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}"
   472→  buc_info "Build submitted: ${z_build_id}"
   473→  buc_link "Click to " "Open build in Cloud Console" "${z_console_url}"
   474→}

   483→zrbf_wait_build_completion() {
   484→  zrbf_sentinel
   485→
   486→  buc_step 'Waiting for build completion'
   487→
   488→  local z_build_id=""
   489→  z_build_id=$(<"${ZRBF_BUILD_ID_FILE}") || buc_die "No build ID found"
   490→  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build ID file empty"
   491→
   492→  buc_log_args 'Get fresh token for polling'
   493→  local z_token=""
   494→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get GCB OAuth token"
   495→
   496→  local z_status="PENDING"
   497→  local z_attempts=0
   498→  local z_max_attempts=240  # 20 minutes with 5 second intervals
   499→
   500→  while true; do
   501→    case "${z_status}" in PENDING|QUEUED|WORKING) : ;; *) break;; esac
   502→    sleep 5
   503→
   504→    z_attempts=$((z_attempts + 1))
   505→    test ${z_attempts} -le ${z_max_attempts} || buc_die "Build timeout after ${z_max_attempts} attempts"
   506→
   507→    buc_log_args "Fetch build status (attempt ${z_attempts}/${z_max_attempts})"
   508→    curl -s                                                \
   509→         -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
   510→         "${ZRBF_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}/${z_build_id}"    \
   511→         > "${ZRBF_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}"                     \
   512→      || buc_die "Failed to get build status"
   513→
   514→    test -f "${ZRBF_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}" || buc_die "Build status file not created"
   515→    test -s "${ZRBF_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}" || buc_die "Build status file is empty"
   516→
   517→    jq -r '.status' "${ZRBF_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}" > "${ZRBF_STATUS_CHECK_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to extract status"
   518→    z_status=$(<"${ZRBF_STATUS_CHECK_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read status"
   519→    test -n "${z_status}" || buc_die "Status is empty"
   520→
   521→    buc_info "Build status: ${z_status} (attempt ${z_attempts}/${z_max_attempts})"
   522→  done
   523→
   524→  test "${z_status}" = "SUCCESS" || buc_die "Build failed with status: ${z_status}"
   525→
   526→  buc_success 'Build completed successfully'
   527→}

   532→rbf_build() {
   533→  zrbf_sentinel
   534→
   535→  local z_vessel_dir="${1:-}"
   536→
   537→  # Documentation block
   538→  buc_doc_brief "Build container image from vessel using Google Cloud Build"
   539→  buc_doc_param "vessel_dir" "Path to vessel directory containing rbrv.env"
   540→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   541→
   542→  buc_log_args "Validate parameters"
   543→  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "Vessel directory required"
   544→
   545→  # Load and validate vessel
   546→  zrbf_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"
   547→
   548→  buc_log_args "Verify vessel has conjuring configuration"
   549→  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE:-}" || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' is not configured for conjuring (no RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE)"
   550→  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT:-}" || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' is not configured for conjuring (no RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT)"
   551→
   552→  buc_log_args "Resolve paths from vessel configuration"
   553→  test -f "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}" || buc_die "Dockerfile not found: ${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}"
   554→  test -d "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}" || buc_die "Build context not found: ${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}"
   555→
   556→  buc_log_args "Enforce vessel binfmt policy"
   557→  if test "${RBRV_CONJURE_BINFMT_POLICY}" = "forbid"; then
   558→    local z_native="$(uname -s | tr A-Z a-z)/$(uname -m)"
   559→    case " ${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS} " in
   560→      *"${z_native}"*) : ;;  # native arch allowed
   561→      *) buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' forbids binfmt but RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS='${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS}'" ;;
   562→    esac
   563→  fi
   564→
   565→  buc_log_args "Generate build tag using vessel sigil"
   566→  local z_tag="${RBRV_SIGIL}.${BUD_NOW_STAMP}"
   567→
   568→  buc_info "Building vessel image: ${RBRV_SIGIL} -> ${z_tag}"
   569→
   570→  # Verify git state + capture metadata
   571→  zrbf_verify_git_clean
   572→
   573→  # Package build context (source code only; build config inlined in API request)
   574→  zrbf_package_context "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}" "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}"
   575→
   576→  # Prepare build substitutions (variable names kept as _RBGY_* for template compatibility)
   577→  local z_dockerfile_name="${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE##*/}"
   578→
   579→  buc_log_args 'Read git info from file'
   580→  jq -r '.commit' "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${ZRBF_GIT_COMMIT_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to extract git commit"
   581→  jq -r '.branch' "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${ZRBF_GIT_BRANCH_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to extract git branch"
   582→  jq -r '.repo'   "${ZRBF_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${ZRBF_GIT_REPO_FILE}"   || buc_die "Failed to extract git repo"
   583→
   584→  local z_git_commit=""
   585→  local z_git_branch=""
   586→  local z_git_repo=""
   587→  z_git_commit=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_COMMIT_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read git commit"
   588→  z_git_branch=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_BRANCH_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read git branch"
   589→  z_git_repo=$(<"${ZRBF_GIT_REPO_FILE}")     || buc_die "Failed to read git repo"
   590→
   591→  test -n "${z_git_commit}" || buc_die "Git commit is empty"
   592→  test -n "${z_git_branch}" || buc_die "Git branch is empty"
   593→  test -n "${z_git_repo}"   || buc_die "Git repo is empty"
   594→
   595→  buc_log_args 'Create build config with substitutions for RBGJB template'
   596→  # Note: _RBGY_MACHINE_TYPE and _RBGY_TIMEOUT are set directly in API request,
   597→  # not via substitution, so they are omitted here to avoid Cloud Build errors.
   598→  jq -n                                                       \
   599→    --arg zjq_dockerfile     "${z_dockerfile_name}"             \
   600→    --arg zjq_moniker        "${RBRV_SIGIL}"                    \
   601→    --arg zjq_platforms      "${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS// /,}"   \
   602→    --arg zjq_gar_location   "${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}"             \
   603→    --arg zjq_gar_project    "${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}"           \
   604→    --arg zjq_gar_repository "${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"           \
   605→    --arg zjq_git_commit     "${z_git_commit}"                  \
   606→    --arg zjq_git_branch     "${z_git_branch}"                  \
   607→    --arg zjq_git_repo       "${z_git_repo}"                    \
   608→    '{
   609→      substitutions: {
   610→        _RBGY_DOCKERFILE:     $zjq_dockerfile,
   611→        _RBGY_MONIKER:        $zjq_moniker,
   612→        _RBGY_PLATFORMS:      $zjq_platforms,
   613→        _RBGY_GAR_LOCATION:   $zjq_gar_location,
   614→        _RBGY_GAR_PROJECT:    $zjq_gar_project,
   615→        _RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY: $zjq_gar_repository,
   616→        _RBGY_GIT_COMMIT:     $zjq_git_commit,
   617→        _RBGY_GIT_BRANCH:     $zjq_git_branch,
   618→        _RBGY_GIT_REPO:       $zjq_git_repo
   619→      }
   620→    }' >  "${ZRBF_BUILD_CONFIG_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to create build config"
   621→
   622→  # Stage & submit new flow
   623→  zrbf_compose_tarball_name

   629→  zrbf_wait_build_completion

   640→rbf_study() {

   642→
   643→  buc_doc_brief "Run minimal Cloud Build multipart study in-place"

   664→rbf_delete() {
   665→  zrbf_sentinel
   666→
   667→  local z_moniker="${1:-}"
   668→  local z_tag="${2:-}"
   669→
   670→  # Documentation block
   671→  buc_doc_brief "Delete an image tag from the registry"
   672→  buc_doc_param "moniker" "Image name (e.g., rbev-busybox)"
   673→  buc_doc_param "tag" "Image tag to delete"
   674→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   675→
   676→  # Validate parameters
   677→  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "Moniker parameter required"
   678→  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag parameter required"
   679→
   680→  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
   681→
   682→  # Get OAuth token using Director credentials
   683→  local z_token
   684→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
   685→
   686→  buc_step "Deleting tag: ${z_moniker}:${z_tag}"
   687→
   688→  # Delete by tag reference (not digest)
   689→  # GAR requires tag deletion before manifest can be removed
   690→  local z_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}status.txt"
   691→  local z_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}response.json"
   692→
   693→  curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
   694→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
   695→    -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
   696→    -o "${z_response_file}"                           \
   697→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_moniker}/manifests/${z_tag}" \
   698→    > "${z_status_file}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed"
   699→
   700→  local z_http_code
   701→  z_http_code=$(<"${z_status_file}")
   702→  test -n "${z_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty"
   703→
   704→  if test "${z_http_code}" != "202" && test "${z_http_code}" != "204"; then
   705→    buc_warn "Response body: $(cat "${z_response_file}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'empty')"
   706→    buc_die "Delete failed with HTTP ${z_http_code}"
   707→  fi
   708→
   709→  buc_success "Tag deleted: ${z_moniker}:${z_tag}"
   710→}
   711→
   712→rbf_list() {
   713→  zrbf_sentinel
   714→
   715→  local z_moniker="${1:-}"
   716→
   717→  # Documentation block
   718→  buc_doc_brief "List images and tags in the Artifact Registry repository"
   719→  buc_doc_param "moniker" "Optional: specific image moniker to list tags for (e.g., rbev-busybox)"
   720→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   721→
   722→  # Note: Ideally uses Retriever role, but Director also has read access
   723→  buc_step "Fetching OAuth token (Director)"
   724→  local z_token
   725→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
   726→
   727→  if test -n "${z_moniker}"; then
   728→    # List tags for specific moniker
   729→    buc_step "Listing tags for: ${z_moniker}"
   730→
   731→    local z_tags_file="${BUD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_list_tags.json"
   732→    curl -sL \
   733→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
   734→      "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_moniker}/tags/list" \
   735→      > "${z_tags_file}" || buc_die "Failed to fetch tags"
   736→
   737→    # Check for error response
   738→    if jq -e '.errors' "${z_tags_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   739→      local z_error
   740→      z_error=$(jq -r '.errors[0].message // "Unknown error"' "${z_tags_file}")
   741→      buc_die "Registry error: ${z_error}"
   742→    fi
   743→
   744→    # Check if -meta companion exists
   745→    local z_meta_moniker="${z_moniker}-meta"
   746→    local z_meta_file="${BUD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_list_meta_check.json"
   747→    local z_has_meta=false
   748→    curl -sL \
   749→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
   750→      "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_meta_moniker}/tags/list" \
   751→      > "${z_meta_file}" 2>/dev/null
   752→    if ! jq -e '.errors' "${z_meta_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   753→      z_has_meta=true
   754→    fi
   755→
   756→    # Display tags with full references
   757→    echo ""
   758→    echo "Images for moniker: ${z_moniker}"
   759→    echo ""
   760→    jq -r '.tags[]? // empty' "${z_tags_file}" | sort -r | while read -r tag; do
   761→      local z_full_ref="${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBF_REGISTRY_PATH}/${z_moniker}:${tag}"
   762→      if test "${z_has_meta}" = "true"; then
   763→        echo "  ${z_full_ref} [meta]"
   764→      else
   765→        echo "  ${z_full_ref}"
   766→      fi
   767→    done
   768→  else
   769→    # List all images (packages) in repository using Artifact Registry REST API
   770→    # Docker Registry v2 _catalog doesn't work with GAR
   771→    buc_step "Listing all images in repository"
   772→
   773→    local z_packages_file="${BUD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_list_packages.json"
   774→    local z_gar_api="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com/v1"
   775→    local z_repo_path="projects/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}/repositories/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
   776→
   777→    curl -sL \
   778→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
   779→      "${z_gar_api}/${z_repo_path}/packages" \
   780→      > "${z_packages_file}" || buc_die "Failed to fetch packages"
   781→
   782→    # Check for error response
   783→    if jq -e '.error' "${z_packages_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   784→      local z_error
   785→      z_error=$(jq -r '.error.message // "Unknown error"' "${z_packages_file}")
   786→      buc_die "API error: ${z_error}"
   787→    fi
   788→
   789→    # Extract package names and build meta companion map
   790→    local z_packages_list="${BUD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_list_packages.txt"
   791→    jq -r '.packages[]?.name // empty' "${z_packages_file}" | while read -r pkg; do
   792→      # Extract just the image name (last path component after /packages/)
   793→      echo "${pkg##*/}"
   794→    done | sort > "${z_packages_list}"
   795→
   796→    # Build list of primary monikers (exclude -meta companions)
   797→    local z_primary_list="${BUD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_list_primary.txt"
   798→    grep -v -- '-meta$' "${z_packages_list}" > "${z_primary_list}"
   799→
   800→    # Create meta companion lookup map
   801→    local z_meta_map="${BUD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_list_meta_map.txt"
   802→    > "${z_meta_map}"
   803→    while IFS= read -r moniker; do
   804→      local z_meta_candidate="${moniker}-meta"
   805→      if grep -Fxq "${z_meta_candidate}" "${z_packages_list}"; then
   806→        echo "${moniker}" >> "${z_meta_map}"
   807→      fi
   808→    done < "${z_primary_list}"
   809→
   810→    echo ""
   811→    echo "All images in repository:"
   812→    echo ""
   813→
   814→    # For each primary moniker, fetch tags and display with full references
   815→    while IFS= read -r moniker; do
   816→      local z_tags_file="${BUD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_list_tags_${moniker}.json"
   817→      curl -sL \
   818→        -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
   819→        "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${moniker}/tags/list" \
   820→        > "${z_tags_file}" 2>/dev/null || continue
   821→
   822→      # Skip if error response
   823→      if jq -e '.errors' "${z_tags_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   824→        continue
   825→      fi
   826→
   827→      # Check if this moniker has a meta companion
   828→      local z_has_meta=false
   829→      if grep -Fxq "${moniker}" "${z_meta_map}"; then
   830→        z_has_meta=true
   831→      fi
   832→
   833→      # Display each tag with full reference
   834→      jq -r '.tags[]? // empty' "${z_tags_file}" | sort -r | while read -r tag; do
   835→        local z_full_ref="${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBF_REGISTRY_PATH}/${moniker}:${tag}"
   836→        if test "${z_has_meta}" = "true"; then
   837→          echo "  ${z_full_ref} [meta]"
   838→        else
   839→          echo "  ${z_full_ref}"
   840→        fi
   841→      done
   842→    done < "${z_primary_list}"
   843→
   844→    local z_count
   845→    z_count=$(wc -l < "${z_primary_list}" | tr -d ' ')
   846→    echo ""
   847→    echo "Total: ${z_count} image(s)"
   848→  fi
   849→
   850→  buc_success "List complete"
   851→}
   852→
   853→rbf_retrieve() {
   854→  zrbf_sentinel
   855→
   856→  local z_image_ref="${1:-}"
   857→
   858→  # Documentation block
   859→  buc_doc_brief "Pull an image from the registry to local container runtime"
   860→  buc_doc_param "image_ref" "Image reference: moniker:tag or moniker@digest"
   861→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   862→
   863→  # Validate parameter
   864→  test -n "${z_image_ref}" || buc_die "Image reference required (name:tag or name@digest)"
   865→
   866→  # Parse image reference (moniker:tag or moniker@digest)
   867→  local z_moniker=""
   868→  local z_ref_part=""
   869→
   870→  if [[ "${z_image_ref}" == *"@"* ]]; then
   871→    # Digest format: moniker@sha256:...
   872→    z_moniker="${z_image_ref%%@*}"
   873→    z_ref_part="${z_image_ref#*@}"
   874→  elif [[ "${z_image_ref}" == *":"* ]]; then
   875→    # Tag format: moniker:tag
   876→    z_moniker="${z_image_ref%%:*}"
   877→    z_ref_part="${z_image_ref#*:}"
   878→  else
   879→    buc_die "Invalid image reference format. Expected name:tag or name@digest"
   880→  fi
   881→
   882→  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "Moniker is empty"
   883→  test -n "${z_ref_part}" || buc_die "Tag or digest is empty"
   884→
   885→  buc_step "Authenticating as Retriever"
   886→
   887→  # Prefer Retriever credentials, fallback to Director
   888→  local z_rbra_file=""
   889→  if test -n "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE:-}" && test -f "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"; then
   890→    z_rbra_file="${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
   891→    buc_info "Using Retriever credentials"
   892→  else
   893→    z_rbra_file="${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
   894→    buc_info "Retriever not configured, using Director credentials"
   895→  fi
   896→
   897→  # Get OAuth token
   898→  local z_token
   899→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${z_rbra_file}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
   900→
   901→  buc_step "Logging into container registry"
   902→
   903→  # Construct full image reference
   904→  local z_full_ref="${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBF_REGISTRY_PATH}/${z_image_ref}"
   905→
   906→  # Docker login to GAR
   907→  echo "${z_token}" | docker login -u oauth2accesstoken --password-stdin "https://${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}" \
   908→    || buc_die "Container runtime authentication failed"
   909→
   910→  buc_step "Pulling image: ${z_full_ref}"
   911→
   912→  # Pull image
   913→  docker pull "${z_full_ref}" || buc_die "Image pull failed"
   914→
   915→  # Get local image ID
   916→  local z_image_id
   917→  z_image_id=$(docker inspect --format='{{.Id}}' "${z_full_ref}" 2>/dev/null) \
   918→    || buc_die "Failed to get image ID"
   919→
   920→  # Display results
   921→  echo ""
   922→  echo "Image retrieved: ${z_full_ref}"
   923→  echo "Local image ID: ${z_image_id}"
   924→
   925→  buc_success "Image pull complete"
   926→}
   927→
   928→# eof
   929→
   930→

    31→zrbgc_kindle() {

    34→  # Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)

    36→  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
    37→  RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
    38→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
    39→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
    40→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"
    41→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT="+%y%m%d%H%M%S"
    42→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN=12
    43→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX="[0-9]{${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"
    44→  RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_NAME_MAX=10
    45→
    46→  # Global resource validation patterns
    47→  # Payor:  rbwg-p-YYMMDDHHMMSS
    48→  # Depot:  rbwg-d-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
    49→  # Bucket: rbwg-b-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
    50→  RBGC_GLOBAL_PAYOR_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
    51→  RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
    52→  RBGC_GLOBAL_BUCKET_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"

    95→  RBGC_CRM_V3="/v3"
    96→  RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1="/v1"

    98→  RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1="/v1"

   100→  RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1="/v1"

rbf_retrieve() {
  zrbf_sentinel

  local z_image_ref="${1:-}"

  # Documentation block
  buc_doc_brief "Pull an image from the registry to local container runtime"
  buc_doc_param "image_ref" "Image reference: moniker:tag or moniker@digest"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  # Validate parameter
  test -n "${z_image_ref}" || buc_die "Image reference required (name:tag or name@digest)"

  # Parse image reference (moniker:tag or moniker@digest)
  local z_moniker=""
  local z_ref_part=""

  if [[ "${z_image_ref}" == *"@"* ]]; then
    # Digest format: moniker@sha256:...
    z_moniker="${z_image_ref%%@*}"
    z_ref_part="${z_image_ref#*@}"
  elif [[ "${z_image_ref}" == *":"* ]]; then
    # Tag format: moniker:tag
    z_moniker="${z_image_ref%%:*}"
    z_ref_part="${z_image_ref#*:}"
  else
    buc_die "Invalid image reference format. Expected name:tag or name@digest"
  fi

  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "Moniker is empty"
  test -n "${z_ref_part}" || buc_die "Tag or digest is empty"

  buc_step "Authenticating as Retriever"

  # Prefer Retriever credentials, fallback to Director
  local z_rbra_file=""
  if test -n "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE:-}" && test -f "${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"; then
    z_rbra_file="${RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
    buc_info "Using Retriever credentials"
  else
    z_rbra_file="${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
    buc_info "Retriever not configured, using Director credentials"
  fi

  # Get OAuth token
  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${z_rbra_file}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"

  buc_step "Logging into container registry"

  # Construct full image reference
  local z_full_ref="${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBF_REGISTRY_PATH}/${z_image_ref}"

  # Docker login to GAR
  echo "${z_token}" | docker login -u oauth2accesstoken --password-stdin "https://${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}" \
    || buc_die "Container runtime authentication failed"

  buc_step "Pulling image: ${z_full_ref}"

  # Pull image
  docker pull "${z_full_ref}" || buc_die "Image pull failed"

  # Get local image ID
  local z_image_id
  z_image_id=$(docker inspect --format='{{.Id}}' "${z_full_ref}" 2>/dev/null) \
    || buc_die "Failed to get image ID"

  # Display results
  echo ""
  echo "Image retrieved: ${z_full_ref}"
  echo "Local image ID: ${z_image_id}"

  buc_success "Image pull complete"
}

  local z_image_ref="${1:-}"

  # Documentation block
  buc_doc_brief "Pull an image from the registry to local container runtime"
  buc_doc_param "image_ref" "Image reference: moniker:tag or moniker@digest"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

rbf_abjure() {
  zrbf_sentinel

  local z_vessel="${1:-}"
  local z_consecration="${2:-}"
  local z_force="${3:-}"

  # Documentation block
  buc_doc_brief "Abjure an ark (delete both -image and -about artifacts as a coherent unit)"
  buc_doc_param "vessel" "Vessel name (e.g., rbev-busybox)"
  buc_doc_param "consecration" "Consecration timestamp (e.g., 20250206T120000Z)"
  buc_doc_param "--force" "Optional: skip confirmation prompt"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  # Validate parameters
  test -n "${z_vessel}" || buc_die "Vessel parameter required"
  test -n "${z_consecration}" || buc_die "Consecration parameter required"

  # Check for --force flag in remaining arguments
  local z_skip_confirm=false
  if test "${z_force}" = "--force"; then
    z_skip_confirm=true
  fi

  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"

  # Get OAuth token using Director credentials
  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"

  # Construct ark tags
  local z_image_tag="${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
  local z_about_tag="${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}"

  buc_step "Verifying ark existence"

  # Check if -image artifact exists
  local z_image_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}image_status.txt"
  local z_image_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}image_response.json"

  curl -X HEAD -s                                   \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
    -o "${z_image_response_file}"                   \
    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_image_tag}" \
    > "${z_image_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -image artifact"

  local z_image_http_code
  z_image_http_code=$(<"${z_image_status_file}")
  test -n "${z_image_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -image"

  local z_image_exists=false
  if test "${z_image_http_code}" = "200"; then
    z_image_exists=true
  elif test "${z_image_http_code}" != "404"; then
    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_image_http_code} when checking -image artifact"
  fi

  # Check if -about artifact exists
  local z_about_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}about_status.txt"
  local z_about_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}about_response.json"

  curl -X HEAD -s                                   \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
    -o "${z_about_response_file}"                   \
    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
    > "${z_about_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -about artifact"

  local z_about_http_code
  z_about_http_code=$(<"${z_about_status_file}")
  test -n "${z_about_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about"

  local z_about_exists=false
  if test "${z_about_http_code}" = "200"; then
    z_about_exists=true
  elif test "${z_about_http_code}" != "404"; then
    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_about_http_code} when checking -about artifact"
  fi

  # Evaluate ark state
  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "false" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
    buc_die "Ark not found: neither -image nor -about exists"
  fi

  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: -image exists but -about is missing"
  elif test "${z_image_exists}" = "false" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: -about exists but -image is missing"
  fi

  # Confirm abjuration unless --force
  if test "${z_skip_confirm}" = "false"; then
    echo ""
    echo "Will abjure ark ${z_vessel}/${z_consecration}:"
    if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true"; then
      echo "  - ${z_vessel}:${z_image_tag}"
    fi
    if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
      echo "  - ${z_vessel}:${z_about_tag}"
    fi
    echo ""
    read -p "Proceed with abjuration? [y/N] " -n 1 -r
    echo
    if [[ ! $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
      buc_die "Abjuration cancelled"
    fi
  fi

  # Delete -image artifact if exists
  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true"; then
    buc_step "Deleting -image artifact"

    local z_delete_image_status="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_image_status.txt"
    local z_delete_image_response="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_image_response.json"

    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
      -o "${z_delete_image_response}"                   \
      "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_image_tag}" \
      > "${z_delete_image_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for -image"

    local z_delete_image_code
    z_delete_image_code=$(<"${z_delete_image_status}")
    test -n "${z_delete_image_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -image delete"

    if test "${z_delete_image_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_image_code}" != "204"; then
      buc_warn "Response body: $(cat "${z_delete_image_response}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'empty')"
      buc_die "Failed to delete -image artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_image_code})"
    fi

    buc_info "Deleted: ${z_vessel}:${z_image_tag}"
  fi

  # Delete -about artifact if exists
  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
    buc_step "Deleting -about artifact"

    local z_delete_about_status="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_about_status.txt"
    local z_delete_about_response="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_about_response.json"

    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
      -o "${z_delete_about_response}"                   \
      "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
      > "${z_delete_about_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for -about"

    local z_delete_about_code
    z_delete_about_code=$(<"${z_delete_about_status}")
    test -n "${z_delete_about_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about delete"

    if test "${z_delete_about_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_about_code}" != "204"; then
      buc_warn "Response body: $(cat "${z_delete_about_response}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'empty')"
      buc_die "Failed to delete -about artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_about_code})"
    fi

    buc_info "Deleted: ${z_vessel}:${z_about_tag}"
  fi

  # Display results
  echo ""
  buc_success "Ark abjured: ${z_vessel}/${z_consecration}"
  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true"; then
    echo "  - ${z_vessel}:${z_image_tag} deleted"
  fi
  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
    echo "  - ${z_vessel}:${z_about_tag} deleted"
  fi
}
